basic_details.job_title: ICDS Gaya Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for District Project Assistant and Block Coordinator Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Integrated Child Development Services Gaya (ICDS Gaya)
basic_details.post_name: District Project Assistant and Block Coordinator
basic_details.short_information: Integrated Child Development Services Gaya (ICDS Gaya) has officially released a notification for the recruitment of 3 District Project Assistant and Block Coordinator Posts. This recruitment drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for government jobs. Interested and eligible candidates can apply by sending their resume and documents to the official email address.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 21 years Maximum Age: 37 years Age Relaxation: UR Women: 40 years

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate Degree / Post Graduate Diploma in Management Social Sciences/Nutrition, Graduate
qualification.details: District Project Assistant: Graduate Degree / Post Graduate Diploma in Management Social Sciences/Nutrition. Minimum 2 years work experience of capacity building, With supervisory skills. Good oral and written communication Skills in local language and fair skills in English. Good Computer Skills/Knowledge of internet/email. Ability to work in a team and willingness to travel extensively. Mandatorily local candidates should be engaged. Block Coordinator: Graduate. At least 2 years experience of working with technology and software application support. Good oral and written communication in local language. Mandatorily local candidates should be engaged.

salary_details.details: District Project Assistant: Rs. 18000 Per Month Block Coordinator: Rs. 20000 Per Month

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 16-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for ICDS Gaya Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the ICDS Gaya Recruitment 2026 is 16th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for District Project Assistant and Block Coordinator posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies announced by ICDS Gaya for the posts of District Project Assistant (1 vacancy) and Block Coordinator (2 vacancies).

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for these posts?
faq.answer: For District Project Assistant, a Graduate Degree / Post Graduate Diploma in Management Social Sciences/Nutrition is required. For Block Coordinator, a Graduate degree is the minimum qualification.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the applicants?
faq.answer: The age limit for all posts is between 21 years and 37 years. There is also an age relaxation for UR Women candidates.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for these positions?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a monthly salary ranging from Rs. 18,000 to Rs. 20,000, depending on the post.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for ICDS Gaya Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for ICDS Gaya Recruitment 2026 is through email. Candidates need to send their applications to the official email address provided in the notification.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The positions of District Project Assistant and Block Coordinator are on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q9. What experience is required for the District Project Assistant post?
faq.answer: A minimum of 2 years of work experience in capacity building with supervisory skills is required for the District Project Assistant post.

faq.question: Q10. Are local candidates preferred for these roles?
faq.answer: Yes, the notification explicitly states that mandatorily local candidates should be engaged for both the District Project Assistant and Block Coordinator positions.
